name: ga-cookie-opt-in
comment: Custom Japanese cookie opt-in template (ga_cookie_opt_in localStorage flag, e.g. tokorozawa-sakuratown.com and other KADOKAWA / Japanese sites). Acceptance is implicit on navigation per the popup copy and there is no reject button, so opt-out is cosmetic. Google Analytics is gated on the same localStorage flag, so simply hiding the banner without setting it leaves analytics disabled.
